data.name: The Femdom Project 3
data.detailed_description:
Immediately after Maka leaves your room, Fumiko, the 4th Femdom Project applicant, knocks on your door, and just like Sadow, the only thing she wants to do is use you to relieve her pent-up sadistic and sexual urges. Unlike Sadow and Maka, Fumiko's constantly pissed off at you and wastes no time in using you as her personal stress relief by mercilessly bullying, beating, humiliating, and tormenting you.

Meet Fumiko, the 4th Femdom Project applicant, who's in a pissy mood and mercilessly bullies you to vent her sadistic and sexual urges.

  • ~1.7K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Meet Fumiko, the 4th Femdom Project applicant, who's in a pissy mood and mercilessly bullies you to vent her sadistic and sexual urges.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
